PLAINTIFFS ARE REQUIRED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM MAY 10 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: ANGIE DINER CSR # 9581
